name: Italian Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces process cheese food (1 cup), grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease an 8 x 8 x 2-inch baking dish.
2. Heat the olive oil in a skillet and cook the garlic until lightly browned.
3. Stir the cheese, oil, and garlic into the rice.
4. Rinse and remove stems from the tomatoes. Cut a 1/4-inch slice from each tomato and set aside.
5. With a sharp knife, cut down around the inside of the tomatoes, being careful not to cut through the bottom.
6. Spoon out the pulp.
7. Strain the tomato pulp and set aside the liquid.
8. Sprinkle salt on each tomato.
9. Fill each tomato with the rice and cheese mixture.
10. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon of tomato liquid over each tomato.
11. Replace the tops of the tomatoes.
12. Place the tomatoes in the prepared baking dish.
13. Pour 2 tablespoons olive oil over the tomatoes.
14. Bake at 375 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes.
15. Garnish with water cress. Makes 6 servings.
